name: Chatwoot Outbound Sender - De Paseo en Fincas
description: Outbound sender itemized for media delivery. Expands Drive folders to assets and sends each asset with native HTTP Request nodes.

parameters.url: ={{ ("https://chatwoot-9qe1j-u48275.vm.elestio.app").replace(/\/$/, '') + '/api/v1/accounts/' + String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.chatwoot_account_id || "1") + '/conversations/' + String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.chatwoot_id) + '/messages' }}

parameters.name: content
parameters.value: ={{ $('Loop outbound items').item.json.send_caption === true ? String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.caption || '') : '' }}

parameters.url: ={{ ("https://chatwoot-9qe1j-u48275.vm.elestio.app").replace(/\/$/, '') + '/api/v1/accounts/' + String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.chatwoot_account_id || "1") + '/conversations/' + String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.chatwoot_id) + '/messages' }}
parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: 'No pude adjuntar uno de los assets de ' + String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.property_title || 'la finca') + ' en este momento. Te comparto el enlace:\n' + String($('Loop outbound items').item.json.source_url || $('Loop outbound items').item.json.download_url || ''), message_type: 'outgoing', private: $('Loop outbound items').item.json.private === true }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ content: String($json.content || '').trim(), message_type: 'outgoing', private: $json.private === true }) }}

activeVersion.description: Legacy outbound sender retained for text-only or follow-up flows. Media delivery now runs itemized in the main workflow.
